context.description: Implement CROA (Credit Repair Organizations Act) compliance gate that must be displayed and accepted before any dispute letter generation. Required by law for credit repair services. Frontend gate component + backend enforcement.
acceptance_criteria: frontend/src/components/croa/CROADisclosureModal.tsx renders CROA disclosure text (from PRD) with: title 'Important Legal Disclosure', body text explaining rights under CROA, checkbox 'I have read and understood the above disclosure', disabled Accept button until checkbox checked, timestamps acceptance
DisputeWizardPage.tsx checks use-auth().user.croa_disclosure_accepted before rendering wizard steps - if false, shows CROADisclosureModal as blocking overlay
On modal acceptance: calls POST /api/v1/users/croa-accept (authenticated), updates profiles table (croa_disclosure_accepted=true, croa_disclosure_timestamp=now()), updates local auth state
Backend POST /api/v1/users/croa-accept endpoint: validates JWT, upserts profiles record, returns {accepted: true, timestamp: ISO string}
Backend: dispute letter generation endpoints check croa_disclosure_accepted=true, return HTTP 403 if false
Once accepted, modal never shows again for that user (persisted in Supabase profiles)
Verify: New user visits DisputeWizardPage → CROA modal appears → accept → wizard loads
implementation_approach: Step 1: Read frontend/src/pages/DisputeWizardPage.tsx to find entry point for gate
Step 2: Read frontend/src/hooks/use-auth.tsx to understand how to add croa_disclosure_accepted to user state
Step 4: Create CROADisclosureModal.tsx with disclosure text (refer to PRD or CROA Act section 1679b)
Step 5: Add useEffect in DisputeWizardPage.tsx to check croa_disclosure_accepted, show modal if false
Step 6: Add croa-accept endpoint to backend/api/v1/routes/users.py (or new croa.py route)
Step 7: Add croa_disclosure_accepted field read to use-auth.tsx user state initialization
pre_analysis: Read frontend/src/pages/DisputeWizardPage.tsx - current wizard flow structure
Read frontend/src/hooks/use-auth.tsx - user state initialization and Supabase profile fetch
Read backend/api/v1/routes/users.py - existing user route pattern for adding croa-accept endpoint
